title: Dockerfile `VOLUME` fails if parent is symlink
body:
<!--
If you are reporting a new issue, make sure that we do not have any duplicates
already open. You can ensure this by searching the issue list for this
repository. If there is a duplicate, please close your issue and add a comment
to the existing issue instead.

If you suspect your issue is a bug, please edit your issue description to
include the BUG REPORT INFORMATION shown below. If you fail to provide this
information within 7 days, we cannot debug your issue and will close it. We
will, however, reopen it if you later provide the information.

---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST
-->

**Description**

When building a Dockerfile that has a VOLUME that is nested under a symlink (i.e. `/run`)

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. `buildah bud .`
```Dockerfile
FROM fedora:29
RUN dnf install -y bip
VOLUME ["/var/run/bip"]
```
2.
3.


**Describe the results you received:**
```shell
STEP 8: VOLUME ["/var/run/bip"]
error building at step {Env:[PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin DISTTAG=f29container FGC=f29 FBR=f29 IMAGE_TAG=29 IMAGE=fedora] Command:volume Args:[/var/run/bip] Flags:[] Attrs:map[json:true] Message:VOLUME /var/run/bip Original:VOLUME ["/var/run/bip"]}: error reading symbolic link to "/var/run/bip": error getting symbolic links: have resolved '(' symlinks, something is terribly wrong!
: exit status 1
ERRO[0095] exit status 1    
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Successful build

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
[vbatts@getdown] {redhat *} ~$ buildah version
Version:         1.8-dev
Go Version:      go1.12
Image Spec:      1.0.0
Runtime Spec:    1.0.0
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:  v0.7.0-alpha1
Git Commit:      0a8ec972
Built:           Wed Mar  6 12:34:35 2019
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

```
[vbatts@getdown] {redhat *} ~$ podman version
Version:            1.1.2
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.10.8
Git Commit:         0ad9b6bf2aea4ba37e8c9738feabec61343ba175
Built:              Thu Mar  7 14:55:14 2019
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```


**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
(paste your output here)
```
